title: Maxesd's Garbge
description: This mod adds the most unpredictable things possible.
body:
# ℹ️ About ℹ️

this mod adds proably the wEiRdEst things possible in minecraft.

it's proably the **TRASHIEST, TRASHIEST, TRASHIEST,** mod you've ever seen in your live.

# ➕ what it adds: ➕

- t-posing guy statue
- oversaturated biome with log and leaves
- beans
- DA AETHER
- amongus in a bucket
- electricity shock every time you break a block
- and more!
